b_MembuatProject/membuat-project/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler release property to target Java 21.
b_MembuatProject/membuat-project/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17 bytecode, failing to utilize Java 21 features and potentially causing compatibility issues with libraries requiring Java 21.

b_MembuatProject/membuat-project/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the maven-compiler-plugin version to a newer snapshot release.
